zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Fulford於1340年出生在英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 福爾福德時，他的父親John De Fulford30歲，母親Alicia FitzUrse26歲。他於1374年與Catherine Fitzurse在英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 福爾福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1394年在他的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Fulford于1340年出生在英国英格兰戴文格亞特 福爾福德时，他的父亲John De Fulford30岁，母亲Alicia FitzUrse26岁。他于1374年与Catherine Fitzurse在英国英格兰戴文格亞特 福爾福德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1394年在他的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fulford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named in Devon, such as Fulford in Tiverton, Great Fulford in Dunsford, Fullaford in High Bray, Fulford Bridge in Shebbear, Fullaford in Sampford Courtenay, and Fullaford in Buckfastleigh.

habitational name from one or more of the various places so called elsewhere in England, such as Fulford (Staffordshire), Fulford in Kingston Saint Mary (Somerset), Gate Fulford and Water Fulford (both East Yorkshire), Fulfords Farm in Itchingfield (Sussex), and Fulforth in Witton Gilbert (Durham). All places in 1 above and 2 are named from Old English fūl ‘dirty, muddy’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Fulford was born in 1340, in Great Fulford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John De Fulford, was 30 and his mother, Alicia FitzUrse, was 26. He married Catherine Fitzurse in 1374, in Great Fulford, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1394, in his hometown, at the age of 54.

Il a épousé Catherine Fitzurse en 1374, à Great Fulford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1394, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Fulfordが1340年にイギリスイギリスデボングレアト フウルフォードで生まれた時，父John De Fulfordは30歳，母Alicia FitzUrseは26歳であった。1374年にイギリスイギリスデボングレアト フウルフォードでCatherine Fitzurseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1394年に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Fulford(이)가 1340년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 프퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Fulford(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia FitzUrse(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 프퍼드에서 Catherine Fitzurse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1394년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Fulford родился в 1340 г. в местности грит фьулфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John De Fulford было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alicia FitzUrse, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Fitzurse в 1374 г. в местности грит фьулфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1394 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.
